# Contributing to MiniGig

First off, thanks for taking the time to contribute! 🎉

The following is a set of guidelines for contributing to MiniGig and its SDKs.

## How Can I Contribute?

### Reporting Bugs
* Use a clear and descriptive title.
* Describe the exact steps which reproduce the problem.
* Explain which behavior you expected to see and why.

### Suggesting Enhancements
* Use a clear and descriptive title.
* Provide a step-by-step description of the suggested enhancement.
* Explain why this enhancement would be useful to most MiniGig users.

### Pull Requests
* Fill in the pull request template.
* Follow the style guides (use `npm run lint`).
* Include unit tests for any new features.

## Style Guides
* We use 2 spaces for indentation.
* We use TypeScript for all SDK development.
* We follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) specification.

## Development Setup
1. Clone the repo.
2. Run `npm install`.
3. Run `npm run dev` to start development.
